name: Duplicate Delete Idempotency
rationale: Tests whether delete operation is idempotent - calling delete twice on same entity should not error

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Should be idempotent - second delete should not error

behavior_check.expected: Should be idempotent - second delete should not error

name: Search Without Index
rationale: Tests whether searching unindexed collection works or fails appropriately

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Should work (brute force) or fail predictably without index

behavior_check.expected: Should work (brute force) or fail predictably without index

name: Deleted Entity Search
rationale: Tests whether deleted entity correctly disappears from search results

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Deleted entity should NOT appear in search results

behavior_check.expected: Deleted entity should NOT appear in search results

name: Search After Drop
rationale: Tests whether searching dropped collection properly fails or has stale state bug

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Should fail with appropriate error - collection no longer exists

behavior_check.expected: Should fail with appropriate error - collection no longer exists

name: Load-Insert-Search Visibility
rationale: Tests whether data inserted after loading is immediately visible to search

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Data inserted after load should be immediately searchable

behavior_check.expected: Data inserted after load should be immediately searchable

name: Multi-Delete State Consistency
rationale: Tests whether multiple delete operations maintain correct cumulative state

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Should return no results - all entities deleted

behavior_check.expected: Should return no results - all entities deleted

name: Known-Good Full Lifecycle
rationale: Validates the documented good-path workflow: create, insert, build_index, load, search, drop

name: Duplicate Creation Idempotency (Documented Behavior)
rationale: Verifies documented pymilvus behavior for duplicate collection creation

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Should error consistently or handle gracefully (documented pymilvus behavior)

behavior_check.expected: Should error consistently or handle gracefully (documented pymilvus behavior)

name: Basic Insert-Search
rationale: Minimal viable workflow - create, insert, search, drop

name: Empty Collection Search
rationale: Tests edge case: searching empty collection with no data and no index

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Uncertain - may return empty, error, or auto-create index

behavior_check.expected: Uncertain - may return empty, error, or auto-create index

name: Delete Non-Existent Entity
rationale: Tests edge case: deleting entity that doesn't exist

steps_executed.expected_behavior: Uncertain - may error, ignore, or succeed

behavior_check.expected: Uncertain - may error, ignore, or succeed
